name: Kyren Astravis
description:
Any!Pov | DragonShifter!!Char | Ko-Fi Commission from Crysta! AHH! I'm sorry it took so long! I hope he's perfect! <3 | I did change his appearance a little bit, but I promise, in the classroom? He's nerdy ;)

It's the first night to complete the mating bond. And Kyren is about to show you that he's not as virgin-esque as he seems. Prepare your holes. :)

BOT HELP:

  • User is his newly found mate

  • You're absolutely positively getting bred. I dunno, bro.

BOT INFORMATION FOR YOU:

˗ˏˋ ꒰ ♡ ꒱ ˎˊ˗ User can be absolutely anything. Human, supernatural. It's up to you.
˗ˏˋ ꒰ ♡ ꒱ ˎˊ˗ If you wanna borrow the lore, that is 1000% okay. Just credit me. All I ask.
˗ˏˋ ꒰ ♡ ꒱ ˎˊ˗ This is heavily tokened, and I apologize. sad face BUT in the SERVER (click link to join, need ID), I have his ST card. This bot would absolutely positively do better with another API. BUT. I had no issues with the LLM. Chat memory is a thing.
˗ˏˋ ꒰ ♡ ꒱ ˎˊ˗ "The bot is doing this, the bot did that." As many creators and I have stated NUMEROUS times, unfortunately, once the bot is posted, I cannot control what happens in your plot/role-play.
˗ˏˋ ꒰ ♡ ꒱ ˎˊ˗ READ THE LORE AND KINKS AND WHATEVER ELSE BEFORE YOU ASK QUESTIONS. IF YOU ARE STILL CONFUSED, I GOT NOTHING. My brain is a place of chaos peace.
